name: Prune Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash prunes and boil in water for 10 minutes.
2. Add 1/4 cup sugar and simmer for 5 minutes. Drain, cool, remove pits, and cut into quarters.
3. Cream the remaining 1/4 cup sugar with shortening until smooth.
4. Add beaten egg and sour milk to the mixture, stirring well.
5. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, mixing until just combined.
7. Fold in the chopped prunes and raisins.
8. Pour batter into a greased bread pan.
9. Bake at 375°F for about 50 minutes, or until golden brown and crusty.
10. A Graham Prune Bread can be made by substituting 1 cup graham flour for 1 cup white flour if desired.
